payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the fetch failed and no article content was provided. I will not invent claims from the unavailable source.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL fetch failed with a 404/network error, so no article content or source claims are available to extract durable memory.

details: No durable memory cards were created because the source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Provide a working URL to the article.
Retry fetching the URL later if the network error may be temporary.
